data.name: The Traveller
data.detailed_description:
"The Traveller" is a choice driven high quality erotic Visual Novel/Game with plenty of adventures.


How about becoming friends with a real mafia boss? Or spending the night with a kinky FBI female agent?
Would you like to have dirty sex in the alley behind a nightclub?
Or have dinner at an expensive restaurant? Or go for a ride with a 400-horse powered speedboat?
Ever wanted to be close friends with a celebrity, or to experience a hot threesome with two beautiful girls?
How about playing bondage games? Or spending a romantic night with the girl you love?
The Traveller offers many adventures for every taste!
If you value high quality realistic 3D art and an interesting plot, this game is definitely for you!

What's included:

- Three assignments to complete
- 10 hot girls you can meet (ranging from waitresses to FBI agents and celebrities)
- 20+ different locations
- 18 characters in total
- HQ animations
- Multiple choices
- Good humor
- Bonus video for the winner
- Walkthrough (in case you're lost)

Realistic characters and locations, intriguing plot and hot sex action - this unique game has it all!

data.short_description: Complete the mission for a secret organization and meet some hot girls and women!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Core i3 of Sandy Bridge generation or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics Series (It needs 2GB memory allocation)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
